2606.22494.title: Deep Learning-Based Sign Language Recognition from Videos and Cross-Lingual Translation to Indian Vernaculars
2606.22494.paper_summary: Sign language is a primary mode of communication for the global deaf and hard-of-hearing community, yet automated tools that recognize sign gestures from video and translate them into natural language text remain limited, particularly for low-resource Indian languages. We present a two-stage deep learning pipeline that (i) classifies short sign language video clips into English word labels using a fine-tuned VideoMAE video transformer, and (ii) translates the predicted English label into Hindi, Telugu, and Bengali using Meta AI's No Language Left Behind (NLLB-200) multilingual translation model. The classification model is fine-tuned on a 13-class subset of the AI4Bharat Indian Sign Language video corpus from IIT Madras, processing 16-frame clips sampled uniformly from each video at 224 x 224 resolution. Under a small-scale academic setting (13 classes, 197 clips, 80-20 split), the fine-tuned model reaches 99% training accuracy and 78% validation accuracy after 15 epochs. We provide a per-class breakdown via a confusion matrix and classification report, identify the dominant failure modes (confusable adjective pairs such as ugly, deaf, blind, hat, and dress), and describe a Streamlit-based inference demo that takes a user-uploaded video and returns the predicted English label alongside its Hindi, Telugu, and Bengali translations. We discuss the scope, limitations (small label set, isolated-word rather than continuous signing, single-signer style sensitivity, ambiguity of single-word machine translation), and directions for future work, including expanding to sentence-level generation and a larger vocabulary. Code is released to support reproducibility.
2606.22494.paper_summary_zh: 手語是全球聾人和重聽社群的主要溝通方式，但自動化工具能夠從視頻中識別手勢並將其翻譯成自然語言文本的能力仍然有限，尤其是在資源較少的印度語言方面。<lb/>我們提出了一個兩階段的深度學習流程，其中 (i) 使用微調的 VideoMAE 視頻Transformer將短的手語視頻片段分類為英語單詞標籤，以及 (ii) 使用 Meta AI 的 No Language Left Behind (NLLB-200) 多語言翻譯模型將預測的英語標籤翻譯成印地語、泰盧固語和孟加拉語。<lb/>分類模型是在 IIT Madras 的 AI4Bharat 印度手語視頻語料庫的 13 類子集上進行微調的，處理從每個視頻中均勻抽樣的 16 幀片段，解析度為 224 x 224。<lb/>在小規模學術環境下（13 類、197 片段、80-20 分割），微調模型在 15 個訓練週期後達到 99% 的訓練準確率和 78% 的驗證準確率。<lb/>我們通過混淆矩陣和分類報告提供每類的詳細分析，識別出主要的失敗模式（例如 ugly、deaf、blind、hat 和 dress 等容易混淆的形容詞對），並描述了一個基於 Streamlit 的推斷演示，該演示接受用戶上傳的視頻並返回預測的英語標籤及其印地語、泰盧固語和孟加拉語翻譯。<lb/>我們討論了範圍、限制（小標籤集、孤立詞而非連續手勢、單簽名者風格敏感性、單詞機器翻譯的歧義）以及未來工作的方向，包括擴展到句子級生成和更大的詞彙量。<lb/>代碼已發布以支持可重複性。
2606.22494.author: Chandranath Adak et.al.
